report.summary: Drafted 5 social posts (v57, tweets #520-524), newsletter v57, 2 social card SVGs, and Discord announcement covering Chainlink $165M quarterly unlock, Leap Wallet May 28 shutdown, Fear & Greed recovery to 11, Russia crypto wallet declaration law, and weekend market snapshot.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #520: Chainlink Unlocks 19M LINK ($165M) — Quarterly Supply Dump (thread, 3 tweets) — 14.37M to Binance, 4.62M to staking multisig, April $600M+ total unlocks context
Tweet #521: Leap Wallet Shutting Down May 28 (thread, 3 tweets) — migration guide (Keplr/Phantom/Rabby), ATOM redelegation, 100+ networks affected, wallet security
Tweet #522: Fear & Greed Ticks Up to 11 (single tweet) — first consecutive improvement in weeks, $316B stablecoin dry powder ATH, historical sub-10 outcomes
Tweet #523: Russia Crypto Wallet Declaration Law (single tweet) — July 1 deadline, foreign wallet reporting requirement, global regulatory tightening
Tweet #524: Weekend Signal — Aug 9 Market Snapshot (single tweet) — BTC $66,855, ETH $2,058, F&G 11, stablecoins $316B, LINK unlock, Leap sunset

Newsletter v57: 'Chainlink Dumps $165M, Leap Wallet Dies & Fear Starts to Thaw' — market pulse, 10 new pages (5 tools + 5 guides), token unlocks/wallet security worth reading, fear-vs-liquidity degen corner
Discord/Telegram announcement: weekly v57 update with 5 highlights themed around LINK unlock + Leap sunset + fear recovery

sections.title: Key Narratives This Cycle
items: CHAINLINK $165M QUARTERLY UNLOCK: 19M LINK released from non-circulating supply. 14.37M ($125M) sent to Binance (likely OTC/ecosystem funding), 4.62M ($40M) to multisig for staking reward distribution. This is part of Chainlink's regular quarterly cadence (10-20M LINK per quarter). Combined with ARB ($180M), APT ($120M), OP ($95M), and SUI ($85M), April has $600M+ in total token unlocks — a significant supply event during extreme fear conditions.

LEAP WALLET SUNSET — COSMOS MIGRATION: Leap Wallet shutting down all products May 28, 2026 after 4 years supporting 100+ networks. Browser extension, mobile apps, Compass Wallet, SwapFast, and their Cosmos Hub validator all going offline. No specific reason given. Non-custodial so funds are safe, but users must migrate recovery phrases to Keplr, Phantom, or Rabby and redelegate ATOM staking. Major UX loss for Cosmos ecosystem.

FEAR & GREED RECOVERY SIGNAL: F&G ticked from 9 to 11 — still deep in Extreme Fear but the first consecutive days of improvement since the record sub-10 streak began. $316B stablecoin dry powder at ATH creates an unprecedented fear-vs-liquidity divergence. Historical sub-10 readings preceded +40-60% gains within 12 months.

RUSSIA CRYPTO WALLET REGULATION: Russia submitted a bill requiring all residents to declare foreign crypto wallet openings, closings, and transactions to tax authorities starting July 1, 2026. One-month reporting deadline. Part of accelerating global regulatory tightening alongside CLARITY Act movement in the US.

PUBLISHING VELOCITY: 25+ pages published Apr 1-4 (11 learn guides, 5 tools, 4 learn guides, 5 tools). Total published pages now 717 with ~624 orphaned pages available for future promotion. Content authority building rapidly.
